title: Blocky 3D Cobweb
description: A 3D cobweb model that more accurately represents its collision-box.
body:
## Blocky Cobweb
This resource pack updates cobwebs with a blocky model that better represents its collision-box while retaining its roundish appearance. No additional textures were used so that it can be compatible with your favorite resource packs.

_For the full blocky collection, try [Blocky Replacements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blocky-replacements)._

## Showcase
![Showcase of Blocky Cobweb scattered around a cave passage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L4h1FCRK/images/8d507f0f30a3f905b744d56dd0c5c6f537d2a813.png)
